title: Performance, Saved Stories & UI Polish
changes: Stories are now saved and can be re-read from the Stories page
Added pinyin show/hide toggle on the deck view
Refreshed landing page with new features, how-it-works flow, and Chinese typography
AI loading screens now show live status updates, progress steps, and study tips
Saving cards is now instant — redirects immediately while cards save in the background
Parse notes runs context generation and card parsing in parallel (roughly 2x faster)
Story generation uses streaming to keep the connection alive during long AI responses
Upgraded all AI calls to Claude Sonnet 4.6
Centralized model config — all AI calls use a single constant for easy updates
Parallelized database queries in the review API for faster load times
Added lightweight due-count endpoint for the navbar badge (no longer hits full review API)
Fixed double-click protection on save buttons to prevent duplicate submissions
